_comment: Sample case study data for snippet-generator.py — replace with real client details
stat_2_label: saved per week on manual intake
main_problem: Every inquiry that came in after 5pm went unanswered until the next morning — sometimes 16+ hours later — costing them 3–4 potential clients per week.
solution_summary: We deployed a 24/7 AI intake chatbot that qualifies leads, books consultations directly into the firm's calendar, and kicks off a 7-day automated follow-up sequence for every unclosed inquiry.
quote: I used to dread Monday mornings because I knew there'd be a pile of missed weekend inquiries. Now the AI handles all of it and I come in to a full calendar. It paid for itself in the first week.
